name: image_load_dll_azure_microsoft_account_token_provider_dll_load
raw_query: any where file.path:"C:\\Windows\\System32\\MicrosoftAccountTokenProvider.dll" and (not ((process.executable like~ ("C:\\Windows\\System32\\*", "C:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\*")) and process.executable:"*\\BackgroundTaskHost.exe")) and (not (((process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\*")) and process.executable:"*\\IDE\\devenv.exe") or (process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Internet Explorer\\iexplore.exe", "C:\\Program Files\\Internet Explorer\\iexplore.exe")) or (process.executable:"C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft\\EdgeWebView\\Application\\*" or process.executable:"*\\WindowsApps\\MicrosoftEdge.exe" or (process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe", "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe"))) or ((process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft\\EdgeCore\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft\\EdgeCore\\*")) and (process.executable like~ ("*\\msedge.exe", "*\\msedgewebview2.exe"))) or process.executable:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Microsoft\\OneDrive\\OneDrive.exe" or (?process.executable == null)))
